positive: Minimalist stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, composed with strong geometric shapes and clean lines. The main subject is a vibrant, deep teal mountain silhouette rising against a gradient sky of warm burnt orange, soft magenta, and pale gold. The foreground includes abstract, stylized pine trees and stylized geometric hills. Vector art style, high contrast, flat graphic design, inspired by mid-century modern travel posters. Clean, scalable artwork suitable for screen printing on apparel. Perfect central composition.
